notes: Fill in concrete evidence from the exact source and run under review.

condition_1.evidence: Explain why the predictive state at t depends only on the strict prefix.

condition_2.evidence: Explain where the code defines a full normalized distribution over the fixed vocab.

condition_3.evidence: Explain where scoring happens before any update that uses the scored tokens.

condition_4.evidence: Explain why evaluation is a single left-to-right pass with no rescoring.

no_prequant_ttt_on_val.evidence: State where quantization/Hessian/other calibration consumes only training-time data.

no_rescoring.evidence: State why the run does not choose among multiple executions based on observed outcomes.
